p.em: Intel Manual Quality Layout - Implementation Grade

g.text: WriteToPrimary(ctx: Context, key: string, val: []byte, ttl: int64)
ReadFromReplica(ctx: Context, key: string, preferPrimary: bool)

ul.li: SingleFlight: Used in ReadFromReplica to prevent cache stampedes during hot-key recovery.
Ring Hashing: FNV-1a provides optimal distribution for 64-bit keys. Virtual nodes set to 256 per physical node.
Memory: All entries are 8-byte aligned for sync/atomic safety on 64-bit architectures.
Zero-Copy: Use unsafe to cast between byte slices and header structs where possible.
